name: Neon Synthwave
description: A vibrant, retro-futuristic palette inspired by 80s synthwave aesthetics. Hot pinks, electric purples, and cyan neons on deep dark backgrounds create an energetic, bold visual identity.
author: System

referenceTokens.--surface-hierarchy: deep purple/navy base, slightly lighter surface, neon accents pop
referenceTokens.--intended-usage: Gaming, creative portfolios, music, entertainment, retro-themed landing pages
referenceTokens.--text-approach: White or cyan for body, neon pink for highlights, yellow for warnings
referenceTokens.--glow-effects: Apply subtle glow/shadow with primary and accent colors on CTAs and active states
